input-field.name: visibilityMode
input-field.label: Who can see the chatbot
input-field.helpText: Everyone: all visitors. Customers only: only logged-in customers. Specific customer: only the customer with the ID below (for testing).

input-field.name: specificCustomerId
input-field.label: Specific customer ID (testing)
input-field.helpText: Only used when "Who can see the chatbot" is "Specific customer". Paste the customer UUID from Admin → Customers (e.g. from the customer detail URL).

input-field.name: middlewareUrl
input-field.label: Middleware URL
input-field.helpText: Base URL for your middleware (e.g. https://cbshop.commerce-crew.com/api or http://localhost:3330/api/analytics)

input-field.name: middlewareApiKey
input-field.label: Middleware API Key
input-field.helpText: API key provided by CommerceCrew (middleware authentication)

input-field.name: avatarUrl
input-field.label: Avatar image URL
input-field.helpText: Optional. Full URL to an image for the chat header avatar (e.g. copy URL from Media Manager). Leave empty to use the default icon.

input-field.name: welcomeMessage
input-field.label: Welcome message (shown on first open)
input-field.defaultValue:
Hallo! 👋
Willkommen bei DentalKiosk. Ich kann Ihnen bei Produktsuche, Bestellungen und mehr helfen.

💡 Tipp: Nutzen Sie 🎤 für Spracheingabe!

input-field.name: extraInstructions
input-field.label: Extra instructions (sent to the AI)
input-field.helpText: Add shop-specific guidance, tone, or policies for the assistant.

input-field.name: openingHoursSource
input-field.label: Opening hours source
input-field.helpText: Use manual text or fetch from Google (Place ID). Google requires API key on middleware.

input-field.name: shopOpeningHours
input-field.label: Shop opening hours (manual)
input-field.helpText: Used when "Opening hours source" is Manual. e.g. Mo–Fr 9–18 Uhr, Sa 9–13 Uhr.

input-field.name: googlePlaceId
input-field.label: Google Place ID (for opening hours)
input-field.helpText: Used when opening hours source is "From Google". Find in Google Business Profile or Places API.

input-field.name: contactPageId
input-field.label: Contact page ID (Category / Landing / CMS)
input-field.helpText: UUID from Admin: Catalog → Categories (e.g. Kontakt), or Content → Landing pages, or page editor. Same ID as in URL .../category/index/XXX/base. Leave empty to use fallback text.

input-field.name: shopContact
input-field.label: Contact info fallback (if no page)
input-field.helpText: Used when no Contact page ID is set. e.g. Tel. 0123/456789, info@shop.de.

input-field.name: returnPolicyPageId
input-field.label: Return policy / Rückversand page ID (Category / Landing / CMS)
input-field.helpText: UUID from Admin (Category, Landing page, or CMS page). Leave empty to use fallback text.

input-field.name: shopReturnPolicy
input-field.label: Return policy fallback (if no page)
input-field.helpText: Used when no Return policy page ID is set.

input-field.name: aboutUsPageId
input-field.label: About us / Wer wir sind page ID (Category / Landing / CMS)
input-field.helpText: UUID from Admin (Category, Landing page, or CMS page). Leave empty to use fallback text.

input-field.name: shopAboutUs
input-field.label: About us fallback (if no page)
input-field.helpText: Used when no About us page ID is set.

input-field.name: quick4Text
input-field.label: Quick action 4 message to send
input-field.defaultValue: Ich würde gerne meine letzte Bestellung nochmal bestellen.

input-field.name: statsEnabled
input-field.label: Show stats panel (tokens/questions)
input-field.helpText: Only enable for shop owners (not customers).
